notes: Basic Donkey Kong skeleton exists with platforms, ladders, barrels, and hammer, but platforms are flat/horizontal (not the iconic diagonal girders), barrel AI is simplistic and only one barrel spawns at a time, climbing mechanics feel awkward, win condition requires reaching a small area near Pauline which is hard to trigger, and the visual representation is far from the arcade original with primitive shapes and no animation.
Core mechanics are present, but a major logic bug freezes Mario's horizontal movement when holding a hammer (while still allowing him to climb), and physics are frame-rate dependent.

The game runs and basic movement/jumping/climbing/barrels exist, but core Donkey Kong authenticity and mechanics are simplified with flat platforms, unrealistic barrel behavior, and only a rough visual approximation.
